roa.docketEntryComment: Order of Victim Restitution or CR-110 & Abstract of Judgment for Restitution (CR-111)
Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
PROBATION TRANSFER TO ALAMEDA CO SENT
/CAL: APD MOTION TO TRANSFER OUT TO COUNTY OF RESIDENCE (TO ALAMEDA COUNTY)/DAWT/MO GRTD/CTORD: PROBATION IS TRANSFERRED FROM SAN FRANCISCO COUNTYTO ALAMEDA COUNTY/X:COURT ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL:RESTITUTION HEARING/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL PAY RESTITUTION IN THE AMOUNT OF 5,479,00 TO DANIELLARA PLUS A 15% ADMINISTRATIVE FEE,/X:CR-110 ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AND CR-111 ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN COURT,/CCU/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO CCU TO SETUP AN ACCOUNT ON OR BEFORE 11-23-21/CONTPROB/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 288D /CTS:288 /WS/WEAP/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/RESTV/X:RESTITUTION FROMDISMISSED COUNTS OR CASES THOUGH THIS PLEA DEAL ARE HARVEY WAIVERED INTO THIS MATTER/OBEY/ACCEP/SA1:DANIEL LARA;ANGEL MENJIVAR/SA2:151 WAYLAND ST SFCA 94134/SAORD3/SAORD/
/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTSENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:07-27-21/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/TWS/EMTERM/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/STWPX/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD: HOME DETENTION EXCEPT FOR WORK/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASEDWITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/WEAP/SA1: DANIEL LARA, ANGEL MENJIVAR AND LUIS GUMARRA/SA2: 100 BLOCK OF WAYLAND STREET, SF, CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/977/TE:15 MIN/CONTD:RESTITUTION HEARING/DOPU:ATTY AUTH/
/CAL:APD MOTION TO MODIFY VICTIM RESTITUTION/CONTD:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING & CLARIFY VICTIM'S  NAME/DOPU:ATTORNEY HAS AUTHORITY/
/CAL: PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING AND STATUSOF DISCOVERY/DAWF/
